series_metadata.series_title: Private Duty Nursing (PDN) Authorization and Administration Files
series_metadata.series_description: Record contains, but not limited to, request for PDN Prior Authorization(form ODM 02374), assessments, acuity tool, prior authorizations, all supporting back up documentation, denial decisions, hearing notices and decisions, appeals summaries, PDN consumer case files, and reimbursement decisions.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office, 4 years in records center
